It's in a confirmed Stage 2 uptrend and has formed a VCP with 3 contractions (tightest: 2.0%) — the textbook pre-breakout coiling that Minervini built his career on. With earnings 11 days away, this is in the optimal pre-earnings catalyst window. Strong growth stocks often run 10-20% into their report. Fundamentals back it up: EPS +56% and revenue +16% YoY — the kind of numbers that attract institutional money. Trade setup: entry at $139.97, stop at $128.77 (–8%), target $167.96 (+20%). Risk/reward: 2.5:1.

extremely tight base (sub-5% contraction) — high-velocity breakout potential
